content: Rendering polish after browser review: component boxes no longer reserve excessive horizontal whitespace. Layout now uses a 56px minimum node width, tighter label measurement/padding, and only reserves icon-side width for provider-backed nodes instead of every kind-only component. Provider icon nodes still keep enough room to avoid icon/label collision, while short kind-only components such as User and Document Tabs become compact. Verification: npm test -- --run test/layout.test.ts test/render.test.ts test/edges.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm test, npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched.
